Isaiah31:9 ∆čombo rake ricatiza nokutya, macinda ake acavunduswa nomureza, ndi…Äo …Äinotaura Jehova, unomŇčoto wake paZioni, necoto cake paJerusarema." 
Isaiah32:1 Tarirai, mambo uca…ďata  čushe nokururama, macinda aca…ďata aciruramisira." 
Isaiah32:2 Munhu mumŇče nomumŇče uca ča so čutiziro pamhepo, seci čando pakunaya kukuru kwemvura, senzizi dzemvura pan…Äimbo yakawoma, somumvuri we…óombo guru panyika yafa nenyota." 
Isaiah32:3 Meso a čano čona haaŇčgatsinzini, nze če dza čanonzwa dzicaterera." 
Isaiah32:4 MŇčoyo ya čanotaura  časiŇčgaraŇčgariri …Äakanaka icanzwisisa zi čo, marimi a čanokakamira acazi ča kutaura …Äakanaka." 
Isaiah32:5 ∆āenzi haricazonzi munhu wakakudzwa, munyeŇčgeri haaŇčganzi mukomboreri." 
Isaiah32:6 Nokuti …ďenzi rinotaura …Äo čupenzi, mŇčoyo waro unoita …Äakaipa, …Äaanoita …Äinomhura MŇčari, nokure ča …ÄiŇčgarasha  čanhu pamsoro paJehova, …Äaanorega kugutisa mŇčeya wa čanenzara, nokushaisa  čanenyota cinonwiwa." 
Isaiah32:7 Mito čo yomunyeŇčgeri yakaipa; unofuŇčga mano akaipa, kuti aparadze  čanyoro namashoko enhema, kunyaŇčge unoshaiwa acitaura …Äakanaka." 
Isaiah32:8 Asi wakarurama unofuŇčga …Äinhu …Äakarurama; unorambira panzira ye…Äakarurama. 
Isaiah32:9 Simukai, imi  čakadzi  čagere …Äakanaka, munzwe inzwi raŇčgu; imi  čakunda  časinehanya, tererai kutaura kwaŇčgu." 
Isaiah32:10 Nokuti kana kwapfu čura gore namazu ča, mucatambudzika, imi  časinehanya; nokuti kukohwiwa kwamazambiriŇčga kucakona, Ňčgu ča yoku čuŇčganidza haiŇčga»Ņiki." 
Isaiah32:11 ∆če…óerai, imi  čakadzi  čagere …Äakanaka; tambudzikai, imi  časinehanya; …Äifukurei, mubvise Ňčgu čo dzenyu, mu…ÄisuŇčge …Äi čuno namakudza." 
Isaiah32:12 ∆≤aca…Äiro ča …Äifu ča noku…óa kweminda yaifadza, nomuzambiriŇčga wai…ďereka …Äakanaka." 
Isaiah32:13 Panyika ya čanhu  čaŇčgu pacamera minzwa norukato; …Äirokwa…Äo, pamsoro pedzimba dzose dzomufaro muguta romufaro." 
Isaiah32:14 Nokuti imba yamambo icasiyiwa, guta rina čanhu  čazhinji ricaita …óoŇčgo; cikomo nenhare …Äicashanduka mapako nokusiŇčgaperi, panofara mbizi, namafuro e…Äipfuwo;" 
Isaiah32:15 ku»Ņikira mŇčeya uci…óururwa pamsoro pe…óu ucibva kumsoro, renje rikaita munda uno…ďereka …Äakanaka, nomunda uno…ďereka …Äakanaka ucinzi i…óondo." 
Isaiah32:16 Ipapo kururamisira kucagara murenje, kururama kucagara mumunda uno…ďereka …Äakanaka." 
Isaiah32:17 ∆āasa rokururama rica ča rugare, …Äi…ďereko …Äokururama …Äica ča kunyarara nokutenda nokusiŇčgaperi." 
Isaiah32:18 ∆≤anhu  čaŇčgu  čacagara pa čugaro  čunorugare, napadzimba dzakasimba, napan…Äimbo dzokuzorora dzakadzikama." 
Isaiah32:19 Asi cimvuramabge cica ča‚Äôpo kana …óondo riciwa, neguta ricaparadzwa cose." 
Isaiah32:20 Makaropafadzwa imi munokusha pose panemvura, munosundira makumbo enzombe neemboŇčgoro." 
Isaiah33:1 Unenhamo, iwe unoparadza, usino‚Äźkuparadzwa umene; iwe unoita nokunyeŇčgera, asi ha čanakukuitira nokunyeŇčgera, iwe! Kana wapedza kuparadza, newe  čo ucaparadzwa, kana wapedza kuita nokunyeŇčgera,  čacakuitira nokunyeŇčgera newe  čo." 
Isaiah33:2 Jehova mutinzwirei tsitsi, takakumirirai; i čai ru čoko rwa čo maŇčgwanani ose, noruponeso rwe…óu paŇčgu ča yokutambudzika." 
Isaiah33:3 Marudzi a čanhu akatiza acinzwa mubvumo, marudzi akaparadzirwa imi mucisimuka." 
Isaiah33:4 ‚ĪŅakapambga …Äenyu …Äicaparadzwa, se…Äinoparadza gwatakwata; somumhanyire wemhashu, sai…Äo…Äo  čanhu  čacamhanyira kwa…Äiri." 
Isaiah33:5 Jehova wakakudzwa, nokuti unogara kumsoro; wakazadza Zioni nokururamisira nokururama." 
Isaiah33:6 PaŇčgu ča dzako paca ča nokugarika, nokuwanda kwokuponeswa, no čucenjeri nezi čo; kutya Jehova ndiyo fuma yake." 
Isaiah33:7 Tarirai, mhare dza čo dzino…óanidzira dziri kunze; nhume dzorugare dzinocema …Äikuru." 
Isaiah33:8 Migwagwa mikuru yaparadzwa,  čafambi ha čaci‚Äôpo; waputsa suŇčgano, wa…Äidza maguta, haanehanya nomunhu." 
Isaiah33:9 Nyika inocema, yaziya; Rebanoni ranyadziswa, rowoma; Sharoni rafanana nerenje; Bashani neKarmeri azuka mashizha." 
Isaiah33:10 ‚ĪŅino ndicasimuka, ndi…Äo …Äinotaura Jehova; …Äino ndica…Äisimudza, …Äino ndicakudzwa." 
Isaiah33:11 Imi muca ča nemimba yehundi, muca…ďereka mashaŇčga; mŇčeya wenyu mŇčoto ucakupedzai." 
Isaiah33:12 Marudzi a čanhu acaita sokupiswa kwesuko, seminzwa yakatemŇča, inopiswa nomŇčoto." 
Isaiah33:13 Inzwai, imi muri kure, …Äandakaita; imi muri pedyo, muzi če simba raŇčgu." 
Isaiah33:14 ∆≤atadzi  čari paZioni  čanotya,  časiŇčga…ói MŇčari,  ča…ďatwa noku…óe…óera. Ndianiko pakati pe…óu uŇčgagara nomŇčoto unoparadza? Ndiani pakati pe…óu uŇčgagara nokupisa kusiŇčgaperi?" 
Isaiah33:15 Ndiye unofamba nokururama, unotaura …Äakarurama; iye unosho čora fuma yakawanikwa nokunyeŇčgera, unozuza ma čoko ake aciramba fufuro, unodzi čira nze če dzake, kuti arege kunzwa mashoko eropa, unotsinzina meso ake kuti arege kutarira …Äakaipa;" 
Isaiah33:16 iye ucagara pakakwirira, nhare dzamatombo dzica ča  čutiziro bgake; …Äokudya …Äake uca…Äipiwa, mvura yake haiŇčgapxi." 
Isaiah33:17 Meso ako aca čona mambo pakunaka kwake, aca čona nyika yakakura kwa…Äo." 
Isaiah33:18 MŇčoyo wako ucaraŇčgarira Ňčgu ča yokutya, uciti: Uripiko iye wai čereŇčga, uripiko waiyera mutero? Uripiko wai čereŇčga shoŇčgwe?" 
Isaiah33:19 HauŇčgazo čoni  čanhu  čanehasha,  čanhu  čanorurimi runoshamisa, rwausiŇčgagoni kunzwa, rurimi rwokumŇče rwausiŇčgagoni kunzwisisa." 
Isaiah33:20 Tarirai Zioni, iro guta remitambo ye…óu; meso ako aca čona Jerusarema bga ča  čugaro bgakadzikama, tente risiŇčgazobviswi, mbambo dzaro dzisiŇčgazovomorwi, ne…ďote raro rimŇče risiŇčgazo…óamburwi." 
Isaiah33:21 Asi Jehova uca ča‚Äôpo nesu no čumambo bgake, ica ča n…Äimbo inenzizi neho ča dzakafara, magwa anokwa»Ņiwa haaŇčga»Ņiki‚Äôpo, ne…Äikepe …Äikuru ha…ÄiŇčgapfu čuri‚Äôpo." 
Isaiah33:22 Nokuti Jehova ndiye mutoŇčgi we…óu, Jehova ndiye mutemi wemirairo ye…óu, Jehova ndiye mambo we…óu; iye ucatiponesa." 
Isaiah33:23 Ma…ďote ako akati …óembu‚Äźtembu; haagoni kusimbisa muromo wapasi we…óanda recikepe ca čo, haagoni kutasanura seiri; ipapo …Äakatapxa ne…Äakapambga …Äizhinji …Äinogo čerwa; …Äirema …Äinotora …Äakatapxa." 
Isaiah33:24 Hakuna‚Äźugere‚Äômo, ucati: ndinorwara;  čanhu  čagere‚Äômo  čacakaŇčganwirwa …Äakaipa …Äa čo." 
Isaiah34:1 Swe…óerai, imi marudzi a čanhu, munzwe, tererai imi  čanhu; nyika Ňčgainzwe, ne…Äose …Äayo, pasi pose, ne…Äose …Äino…ďu…óa‚Äômo." 
Isaiah34:2 Nokuti Jehova wakatsamŇčira marudzi ose, unehasha nehondo dzawo dzose; waka čaparadza cose, waka čaisa paku čurawa." 
Isaiah34:3 ∆≤aka čurawa  ča čo  čacarashwa kunze, kunhuwa kwe…Äitunha …Äa čo kucakwira, makomo acanyauswa neropa ra čo." 
Isaiah34:4 Hondo dzose dzoku…óeŇčga dzicanyakatika, …óeŇčga rose ricapetwa sorugwaro rwakapetwa; hondo dzaro dzose dzicawoma, sokuwoma kwamashizha pamuzambiriŇčga,  čuye seshizha rinowoma pamu čonde." 
Isaiah34:5 Nokuti munondo waŇčgu wanwa ukaguta ku…óeŇčga; tarirai uca…ďurukira pamsoro paEdomi, napamsoro pa čanhu  čakatukwa neni, kuti  čatoŇčgwe."

Isaiah34:8 Nokuti Jehova unezu ča rokutsi ča, ne gore rokutsi ča …Äakaitirwa Zioni."

Isaiah34:10 HaiŇčgadzimŇči  čusiku namasikati;  čutsi bgayo  čucakwira nokusiŇčgaperi; rica ča …óoŇčgo ku»Ņikira kumarudzi namarudzi; hakunomunhu uŇčgapfu čura noko nokusiŇčgaperi. 
Isaiah34:11 Asi …Äica ča …Äehukurwizi nenuŇčgu; zizi neguŇčgu ču …Äicagara‚Äômo; ucatambanudzira‚Äôpo rwonzi rwokuparadza necokururamisa ce…Äisinecinhu. 
Isaiah34:12 ∆≤akuru  čayo  čaca…óanirwa ku čushe, asi ha čaŇčga či‚Äôpo; macinda ayo ose aca ča pasina." 
Isaiah34:13 Minzwa icamera mudzimba dzamadzimambo ayo,  čutumbambe ča norukato munhare dzayo;  čuca ča  čugaro bgamaka ča, nen…Äimbo yemhou." 
Isaiah34:14 ‚ĪŅikara …ÄomusaŇčgo …ÄicasoŇčgana namapere, mŇčeya wakaipa uca…óana shamŇčari yawo; …Äirokwa…Äo, cikara co čusiku cicagara‚Äôpo norugare, ciciwana‚Äôpo n…Äimbo yokuzorora." 
Isaiah34:15 Ro čambira icaita …óendere rayo‚Äôpo, nokukandira, nokucoconya mazai ayo, noku čuŇčganidza  čana  čayo mumumvuri wayo; …Äirokwa…Äo, ndi‚Äôpo paca čuŇčganira  ču čaŇčgu, rumŇče norumŇče neshamŇčari yarwo." 
Isaiah34:16 T»Ņakai pabuku yaJehova, mura če; hapanecimŇče ce…Äinhu i…Äi cicashaikwa, cicashaiwa shamŇčari yaco; nokuti muromo waŇčgu wakaraira i…Äo…Äo, nomŇčeya wake waka…Äi čuŇčganidza." 
Isaiah34:17 Iye waka…Äikandira mijenya, ru čoko rwake rwaka…Äiganhurira nyika norwonzi; ica ča ya…Äo nokusiŇčgaperi,  čacagara‚Äômo ku»Ņikira kumarudzi namarudzi." 
Isaiah35:1 Renje nenyika yakawoma …Äicafara; saŇčgo ricafara kwa…Äo, ricatumbuka seru ča." 
Isaiah35:2 Ricatumbuka …Äizhinji, nokufara kwa…Äo nomufaro nokuimba; ricapiwa kunaka kukuru kweRebanoni, no čukomba bgeKarmeri neSharoni;  čaca čona kunaka kukuru kwaJehova, ibgo  čukomba bgaMŇčari we…óu." 
Isaiah35:3 Simbisai ma čoko asinesimba, mutsigire mabvi ano…óe…óera." 
Isaiah35:4 Itiyi kuna čanemŇčoyo inotya: Simbai, musatya! Tarirai, MŇčari wenyu uca čuya nokutsi ča, nokuripira kwaMŇčari; uca čuya acikuponesai." 
Isaiah35:5 Ipapo meso amapofu aca»Ņinudzwa, nenze če dzematsi dzicadzi čurwa." 
Isaiah35:6 Ipapo unokamhina ucakwakuka senondo, rurimi rwembe če če rucaimba; nokuti mvura zhinji icadzutuka murenje, neho ča dzemvura musaŇčgo." 
Isaiah35:7 Jeca, rinopisa, ricashanduka dzi ča, nevu, rinenyota, …Äitu…ďu …Äemvura; pa čugaro bgamaka ča, paai čata, paca ča no čuswa, netsaŇčga nenhokwe." 
Isaiah35:8 Ipapo paca ča nomugwagwa, nenzira, icanzi, Nzira yo čut»Ņene; unet»Ņina haaŇčgafambi nayo, asi ica ča ya čo;  čanofamba nayo, kunyaŇčge ari mapenzi, ha čaŇčgarashiki." 
Isaiah35:9 HapaŇčga či neshumba, kunyaŇčge necikara haciŇčgafambi‚Äôpo; ha…ÄiŇčgawanikwi‚Äôpo, asi  čakadzikinurwa ndi čo  čacafamba‚Äôpo;" 
Isaiah35:10  čakasunuŇčgurwa  čaJehova  čacadzoka,  čaca»Ņika Zioni  čaciimba; mufaro usiŇčgaperi uca ča pamisoro ya čo;  čacawana mufaro nomŇčoyo mucena, kucema nokusuwa kucatiza." 
Isaiah36:1 ‚ĪŅino negore regumi namanna ramambo Hezekia, Sanheribi mambo weAsiria, wakandorwa namaguta ose aJuda akakombga nama»ŅiŇčgo, akaakunda." 
Isaiah36:2 ‚ĪŅino mambo weAsiria akatuma mukuru wa čatariri abve Rakishi aende Jerusarema kunamambo Hezekia nehondo huru. Akamira pamugero wedzi ča rokumsoro pamugwagwa unoenda kumunda womusuki. 
Isaiah36:3 Ipapo Eriakimi mŇčanakomana waHirkia, waiceŇčgeta imba yamambo, naShebna munyori, naJoa mŇčanakomana waAsafi, gota guru,  čaka…ďu…óira kwaari." 
Isaiah36:4 Mukuru wa čatariri akati kwa čari: ‚ĪŅino imi muti kunaHezekia: ‚ĪŅanzi namambo mukuru, mambo weAsiria: Ku čimba uku kwauno čimba nako ndokwei?" 
Isaiah36:5 Ini ndinoti, mano ako nesimba rokurwa naro mashoko …Äawo asinamaturo; …Äino uno čimba naniko, …Äawandimukira ini?" 
Isaiah36:6 Tarira, uno čimba nomu…óon…Äo worutsaŇčga urwu rwakavunika, Egipita, runoti kana munhu akasendama kwaruri, rucapinda muru čoko rwake, rukamu…ďaya; ndi…Äo …Äakaita Farao mambo weEgipita kuna čose  čano čimba naye." 
Isaiah36:7 Asi kana ukati kwandiri: Tino čimba naJehova MŇčari we…óu, ko haazi iye wakabvisirwa matunhu akakwirira namaartari ake naHezekia, akati kunaJuda neJerusarema: Munofanira kunamata pamberi peartari iri here?" 
Isaiah36:8 Nai…Äo…Äo …Äino cipikiranai henyu natenzi waŇčgu, mambo weAsiria, ndikupe mabiza ane…Äuru …Äi čiri, kana iwe ukagona kuisa  čata»Ņi pamsoro pawo." 
Isaiah36:9 UŇčgagona seiko kukunda mukuru mumŇče ku ča…óuku  ča čaranda  čatenzi waŇčgu? ‚ĪŅino wo čimba neEgipita kuti upiwe Ňčgoro namabiza na čo? 
Isaiah36:10 Ini nda čuya kuzorwa nenyika ino kuti ndiiparadze ndisinaJehova kanhi? Ndiye Jehova wakati kwandiri: Enda undorwa nenyika iyo, uiparadze." 
Isaiah36:11 Ipapo Eriakimi, mŇčanakomana waHirkia, naShebna, naJoa  čakati kumukuru wa čatariri: Tinokumbira kuti mutaure henyu na čaranda  čenyu norurimi rweciAramia, nokuti tinocinzwisisa; murege henyu kutaura nesu norurimi rwa čaJuda,  čanhu  čose  čari paru»ŅiŇčgo  ča…Äinzwe." 
Isaiah36:12 Asi mukuru wa čatariri akati kwaari: Tenzi waŇčgu wakandituma kunatenzi wako nokwauri here, kuti nditaure mashoko awa? Haana‚Äźkundituma here ku čanhu  čagere pamsoro poru»ŅiŇčgo, kuti  čadye ndo če ya čo nemvura ya čo pamŇče cete nemi?" 
Isaiah36:13 Ipapo mukuru wa čatariri akamira, aka…óanidzira nenzwi guru norurimi rwa čaJuda, akataura akati: Inzwai mashoko amambo mukuru, iye mambo weAsiria." 
Isaiah36:14 ‚ĪŅanzi namambo: Hezekia Ňčgaarege kukunyeŇčgerai; nokuti haaŇčgagoni kukurwirai; 
Isaiah36:15 Hezekia Ňčgaarege kuku čimbisai naJehova, aciti: Jehova ucatirwira …Äirokwa…Äo; guta iri hariŇčgapiwi muma čoko amambo weAsiria." 
Isaiah36:16 Musaterera Hezekia, nokuti …Äanzi namambo weAsiria: Yananai neni, mu…ďu…óirei kwandiri, mudye mumŇče nomumŇče muzambiriŇčga wake, mumŇče nomumŇče mu čonde wake, mumŇče nomumŇče mvura yetsime rake;" 
Isaiah36:17 ku»Ņikira ini nda čuya ndikutorei, ndikuisei kunyika yakafanana neyenyu, nyika ine…Äiyo newaini, nyika ineciŇčgwa neminda yemizambiriŇčga." 
Isaiah36:18 Cenjerai kuti Hezekia arege kukugombedzerai, aciti: Jehova ucatirwira. Ko mumŇče wa čamŇčari  čamarudzi wakagona kurwira nyika yake paru čoko rwamambo weAsiria here?" 
Isaiah36:19 ∆≤amŇčari  čeHamati neArpadi  čaripi? ∆≤amŇčari  čeSefarvaimi  čaripi? ∆≤akarwira Samaria paru čoko rwaŇčgu here? 
Isaiah36:20 Nda čapi pakati pa čamŇčari  čose  čenyika idzi  čakarwira nyika ya čo paru čoko rwaŇčgu, …Äamunoti Jehova ucarwira Jerusarema paru čoko rwaŇčgu?" 
Isaiah36:21 Asi  čakaramba  čanyerere, ha čana kumupindura shoko rimŇče, nokuti murairo wamambo wakaŇčga uciti: Regai kumupindura." 
Isaiah36:22 ‚ĪŅino Eriakimi mŇčanakomana waHirkia, waiceŇčgeta imba, naShebna munyori, naJoa mŇčanakomana waAsafi, gota guru,  čakaenda kunaHezekia,  čakabvarura Ňčgu čo dza čo,  čakamu čudza mashoko omukuru wa čatariri." 
Isaiah37:1 ‚ĪŅino mambo Hezekia wakati aci…Äinzwa, akabvarura Ňčgu čo dzake, akafuka makudza, akapinda mumba maJehova." 
Isaiah37:2 Akatuma Eriakimi waiceŇčgeta imba, naShebna munyori, na čakuru  ča čaprista,  čakafuka makudza, kumuprofita Isaya mŇčanakomana waAmozi." 
Isaiah37:3 ∆≤akati kwaari: ‚ĪŅanzi naHezekia: Nhasi izu ča rokutambudzika, nerokutukwa, neroku…Äidzwa; nokuti  čana  čaka»Ņika paku…Äarwa, asi hakunesimba roku…Äara naro." 
Isaiah37:4 ‚ĪŅimŇče MŇčari wenyu ucanzwa mashoko ose omukuru wa čatariri, wakatumŇča namambo weAsiria tenzi wake, ku…Äidza MŇčari mupenyu, ago čatuka pamsoro pamashoko aakanzwa iye Jehova MŇčari wenyu; nai…Äo…Äo nyeŇčgetererai  čakasara." 
Isaiah37:5 Nai…Äo…Äo  čaranda  čamambo Hezekia  čaka»Ņika kunaIsaya. 
Isaiah37:6 Isaya akati kwa čari: ∆≤udzai tenzi wenyu, muti: ‚ĪŅanzi naJehova: Usatya hako mashoko awanzwa, andakamhurwa nawo na čaranda  čamambo weAsiria." 
Isaiah37:7 Tarira, ndicaisa mŇčeya wokutya mukati make, ucanzwa guhu, ndokudzokera kunyika yake; ndicamu čurayisa nomunondo munyika yake." 
Isaiah37:8 Nai…Äo…Äo mukuru wa čatariri akadzoka, akawana mambo weAsiria acirwa neRibna, nokuti wakaŇčga anzwa kuti wabva Rakishi." 
Isaiah37:9 ‚ĪŅino wakanzwa pamsoro paTirhaka mambo weEtiopia, …Äicinzi: Wa čuya kuzorwa newe. ‚ĪŅino wakati a…Äinzwa, akatuma nhume kunaHezekia, aciti:" 
Isaiah37:10 Endai mundo čudza Hezekia mambo waJuda, muti: MŇčari wako, wauno čimba naye, Ňčgaarege kukunyeŇčgera, aciti: Jerusarema hariŇčgapiwi muru čoko rwamambo weAsiria." 
Isaiah37:11 Tarira, wakanzwa …Äakaitirwa nyika dzose namadzimambo eAsiria, kuti  čakadziparadza cose; …Äino iwe ucarwirwa here?" 
Isaiah37:12 Ko  čamŇčari  čamamŇče marudzi  čaka čarwira here, iwo akaparadzwa namadzi…ďa…ďa aŇčgu,  čanoti, Gozani, naHarani, naRezefi, na čana  čaEdeni,  čai ča paTerasari?" 
Isaiah37:13 Mambo weHamati uripiko, namambo weArpadi, namambo weguta reSefarvaimi, neHena, neIva?" 
Isaiah37:14 Hezekia akagamucira Ňčwadi pama čoko enhume, akaira ča; Hezekia akakwira kumba kwaJehova, akaipetenura pamberi paJehova." 
Isaiah37:15 Ipapo Hezekia akanyeŇčgetera kunaJehova, aciti:" 
Isaiah37:16 Haiwa Jehova wehondo, MŇčari waIsraeri, iye ugere pamsoro pamakerubimi! Ndimi MŇčari, imi moga, wo čushe bgose bgenyika, ndimi makaita ku…óeŇčga napasi." 
Isaiah37:17 Rerekerai nze če yenyu, Jehova, munzwe; »Ņinudzai meso enyu, Jehova, mu čone; inzwai mashoko ose aSanheribi, wakatuma nhume kuzo…Äidza MŇčari mupenyu." 
Isaiah37:18 ‚ĪŅirokwa…Äo, Jehova, madzimambo eAsiria akaparadza marudzi ose nenyika dzawo," 
Isaiah37:19 akakandira  čamŇčari  ča čo mumŇčoto; nokuti  čakaŇčga  časi  čamŇčari, asi rakaŇčga riri …ďasa rama čoko a čanhu, ari matanda namabge; nai…Äo…Äo aka čaparadza." 
Isaiah37:20 Nai…Äo…Äo …Äino, Jehova, MŇčari we…óu, tiponesei paru čoko rwake, kuti  čushe bgose bgenyika  čuzi če kuti ndimi Jehova, iyemi moga." 
Isaiah37:21 Ipapo Isaya mŇčanakomana waAmozi, akatuma shoko kunaHezekia, akati: ‚ĪŅanzi naJehova MŇčari waIsraeri: ‚ĪŅawanyeŇčgetera kwandiri pamsoro paSanheribi mambo weAsiria," 
Isaiah37:22 heri shoko rakataurwa naJehova pamsoro pake: Mhandara, mukunda weZioni, wakakusho čora nokukuseka; mukunda weJerusarema wakakudzuŇčgudzira musoro wake." 
Isaiah37:23 Ndianiko wawakatuka noku…Äidza? Waka…Äikudza kunaniko nenzwi rako, meso ako akatarira aniko ku…óeŇčga? NdiMut»Ņene waIsraeri!" 
Isaiah37:24 Watuka Jehova na čaranda  čako, ukati: Ndakwira kumakomo marefu neŇčgoro dzaŇčgu zhinji, kun…Äimbo dzomukati dzeRebanoni; ndicatema misidari mirefu iri‚Äôpo, nemisipresi yakatsaurwa iri‚Äôpo, ndicapinda ku»Ņikira kumsoro‚Äźsoro kwaro, ku …óondo raro rino…ďereka …Äakanaka;" 
Isaiah37:25 ndakacera ndikanwa mvura, ndicapxisa nzizi dzose dzeEgipita nokutsika kwetsoka dzaŇčgu." 
Isaiah37:26 Hauna‚Äźkunzwa here kuti ndaka…Äiita kare, kuti ndaka…Äiraira neŇčgu ča dzokutaŇčga‚ÄźtaŇčga? ‚ĪŅino ndakaraira …Äiitike, kuti iwe u če muparadzi wamaguta akakombga nama»ŅiŇčgo, a če matoŇčgo." 
Isaiah37:27 Nai…Äo…Äo  čakaŇčga  čagere‚Äômo  čakaŇčga  čanesimba …óuku,  čakavunduswa nokunyadzwa;  čakafanana no čuswa bge…ďundo, nomuri čo mutema, no čuswa  čuri pamsoro peimba, nomunda we…Äiyo …Äigere kukura." 
Isaiah37:28 Asi ndinozi ča kugara kwako pasi, noku…ďu…óa kwako, nokupinda kwako,  čuye hasha dzako kwandiri." 
Isaiah37:29 Noku…óa kwehasha dzako kwandiri,  čuye nokuti ndakanzwa, ku…Äikudza kwako, ndicaisa rwauro rwaŇčgu mumhino dzako, netomu raŇčgu mumiromo yako, ndikudzosere nenzira yawaka čuya nayo." 
Isaiah37:30 Ici ndico cica ča ciratidzo kwauri: Nhaka mucadya …ÄinoŇčgomera …Äoga, negore recipiri mucadya …Äinomera …Äe kwa…Äiri; asi negore recitatu munofanira kud…Äara, nokuceka, nokusima minda yemizambiriŇčga, mudye micero yayo." 
Isaiah37:31 ‚ĪŅino  čakasara  čakapukunyuka  čeimba yaJuda,  čacaita …Äe midzi pasi, noku…ďereka micero kumsoro." 
Isaiah37:32 Nokuti  čakasara  čaca…ďu…óa Jerusarema, na čakapukunyuka pagomo reZioni; kushiŇčgaira kwaJehova kuca…Äiita." 
Isaiah37:33 Nai…Äo…Äo …Äanzi naJehova pamsoro pamambo weAsiria: HaaŇčgapindi muguta rino, kana kuposhera muse če imomo, kana ku»Ņika pamberi paro nenho čo, kana kututira gomo revu kwariri." 
Isaiah37:34 ‚ĪŅanzi naJehova: Nenzira yaaka čuya nayo, ucadzokera …Äe nayo; haaŇčgapindi muguta rino." 
Isaiah37:35 Nokuti ndicadzitira guta rino, ndiriponese noku…óa kwaŇčgu ini,  čuye noku…óa kwomuranda waŇčgu Davidi." 
Isaiah37:36 ‚ĪŅino mutumŇča waJehova aka…ďu…óa, aka čuraya  čanhu  čane…Äuru …Äinezana namakumi masere ne…Äishanu pamisasa ya čaAsiria; …Äino  čanhu  čakati  čacimuka maŇčgwanani,  čakawana …Äa ča …Äitunha …Äose." 
Isaiah37:37 Nai…Äo…Äo Sanheribi mambo weAsiria akabva, akaenda, akadzokera kwakare, akandogara Nineve." 
Isaiah37:38 ‚ĪŅino wakati acinamata mumba maNisroki, mŇčari wake, Adramereki naSharezeri  čanakomana  čake,  čakamu čuraya nomunondo, i čo  čakatizira kunyika yeArarati. Esari‚Äźhadoni akamute čera pa čushe." 
Isaiah38:1 ‚ĪŅino namazu ča iwayo Hezekia akarwara, aka»Ņikira pakufa. Muprofita Isaya mŇčanakomana waAmozi aka»Ņika kwaari, akati kwaari: ‚ĪŅanzi naJehova: Ciraira nhaka yako, nokuti ucafa, hauŇčgararami." 
Isaiah38:2 Ipapo Hezekia akatende čukira kumadziro, akanyeŇčgetera kunaJehova," 
Isaiah38:3 akati: ∆čoraŇčgarirai henyu, Jehova, kuti ndakafamba pamberi penyu ne…Äokwa…ói nomŇčoyo wose, ndikaita …Äakanaka pamberi penyu. Hezekia akacema kwa…Äo." 
Isaiah38:4 Ipapo shoko raJehova raka»Ņika kunaIsaya, riciti:" 
Isaiah38:5 Enda undoti kunaHezekia: ‚ĪŅanzi naJehova, MŇčari wa…ďa…ďa  čako Davidi: Ndanzwa kunyeŇčgetera kwako, nda čona misodzi yako; tarira, ndicawedzera pamazu ča ako makore anegumi namashanu." 
Isaiah38:6 Ndicakurwira iwe neguta rino paru čoko rwamambo weAsiria;  čuye ndicadzitira guta rino. 
Isaiah38:7 Heci ciratidzo caJehova kwauri, kuti Jehova ucaita cinhu ici caakataura:" 
Isaiah38:8 Tarira, ndicadzosa mumvuri pamitaro, wakaŇčga wadzira nezu ča pacikati caAhazi, udzoke mitaro inegumi. Nai…Äo…Äo zu ča rakadzoka mitaro inegumi pacikati caAhazi, pawakaŇčga wadzira." 
Isaiah38:9 Horwu runyoro rwaHezekia mambo waJuda, paŇčgu ča yaakaŇčga arwara, akapora …Äe pakurwara kwake." 
Isaiah38:10 Ndakati: Ndicapinda pamasu čo eSheori aciri masikati pamazu ča aŇčgu; Ndatorerwa makore aŇčgu akaŇčga asara. 
Isaiah38:11 Ndakati: Handicazo čoni Jehova, iye Jehova, panyika ya čapenyu; Handicazo čoni  čanhu pamŇče cete na čagere panyika." 
Isaiah38:12 ∆≤ugaro bgaŇčgu bgaputswa, bgabviswa kwandiri setente romufudzi; Ndapeta  čupenyu bgaŇčgu, somuruki; ucandigura pacirukiso; Mucandigumisa kubvira maŇčgwanani ku»Ņikira ma…óekwana." 
Isaiah38:13 Ndaka…Äinyaradza ku»Ņikira kwaedza; unovuna mafupa aŇčgu ose seshumba; Mucandigumisa kubvira maŇčgwanani ku»Ņikira ma…óekwana. 
Isaiah38:14 Ndakarira senyeŇčganyeŇčga kana kondo; Ndakacema senji ča; meso aŇčgu akapera nokutarira kumsoro; Haiwa Jehova, ndakamanikidzwa, i čai mumiriri waŇčgu imi." 
Isaiah38:15 NdiŇčgatiyiko? Ndiye wakataura neni, ndiye waka…Äiita; Ndicanatsa kufamba makore aŇčgu ose, noku…óa kwokurwadziwa kwomŇčoyo waŇčgu." 
Isaiah38:16 Ishe,  čanhu  čanorarama ne…Äinhu i…Äo…Äi; ∆≤upenyu bgose bgomŇčeya waŇčgu  čuri ma…Äiri; Nai…Äo…Äo ndiporesei, mundiraramise." 
Isaiah38:17 Tarirai, kutambudzika kwaŇčgu kukuru kwakazondi čigira rugare; Asi makarwira mŇčeya waŇčgu noru…óo pagomba rokuparadzwa; Nokuti makarashira …Äi či …ÄaŇčgu …Äose shure kwenyu." 
Isaiah38:18 Nokuti Sheori harigoni kuku čoŇčgai, rufu harugoni kukurumbidzai; ∆≤ano…ďurukira kugomba ha čaŇčgagoni kutarira …Äokwa…ói yenyu." 
Isaiah38:19 Mupenyu, mupenyu, ndiye ucaku čoŇčgai, se…Äandinoita nhasi; ∆āa…ďa  čacazi čisa  čana  ča čo …Äokwa…ói yenyu." 
Isaiah38:20 Jehova waka…Äigadzira kundiponesa; Nai…Äo…Äo ticaimba nziyo dzaŇčgu nemiteŇčgeranwa Mazu ča ose o čupenyu bge…óu mumba maJehova. 
Isaiah38:21 ‚ĪŅino Isaya wakaŇčga ati: Ňäga čatore …ďundu rama čonde  čarinamire pamota, ipapo ucapora." 
Isaiah38:22 Hezekia  čo wakaŇčga ati: Ciratidzo ndecipi kuti ndicakwira kuimba yaJehova? 
Isaiah39:1 ‚ĪŅino neŇčgu ča iyo Merodaki‚Äźbaradani mŇčanakomana waBaradani, mambo weBabironi, wakatuma Ňčwadi necipo kunaHezekia; nokuti wakaŇčga anzwa kuti wairwara akapora …Äe." 
Isaiah39:2 Hezekia akafara pamsoro pa čo, aka čaratidza imba yakaŇčga ine…Äinokosha …Äake, sirveri, nendarama, ne…Äinonhuwira, namafuta anokosha, neimba yai ča nenhumbi dzake dzose dzokurwa nadzo, ne…Äose …ÄakaŇčga …Äiri pafuma yake; kwakaŇčga kusisinecinhu mumba make, kana mu čushe bgake bgose, ca časina‚Äźkuratidzwa naHezekia." 
Isaiah39:3 ‚ĪŅino muprofita Isaya aka»Ņika kunamambo Hezekia, akati kwaari: ∆≤arume a ča  čakati ku…óiniko? ∆≤aka»Ņika kwauri  čacibvepi? Hezekia akati: ∆≤akaŇčga  čabva kunyika iri kure, Babironi  čaci čuya kwandiri." 
Isaiah39:4 Ipapo akati: ∆≤aka čonei mumba mako? Hezekia akapindura, akati: ∆≤aka čona …Äose …Äiri mumba maŇčgu; hakunecinhu pakati pefuma yaŇčgu candisina‚Äźku čaratidza." 
Isaiah39:5 Ipapo Isaya akati kunaHezekia: Inzwa shoko raJehova wehondo: 
Isaiah39:6 Tarira, mazu ča aca»Ņika, neŇčgu ča iyo …Äose …Äiri mumba mako, ne…Äose …Äaka čuŇčganidzwa namadzi…ďa…ďa ako ku»Ņikira …Äu ča ranhasi, …Äicaiswa Babironi; hakunecinhu cicasiyiwa, ndi…Äo …Äinotaura Jehova." 
Isaiah39:7 ∆≤amŇče  čanakomana  čako,  čacabva kwauri,  čauca…ďereka,  čacatapxa;  čaca ča  čaranda mumba mamambo weBabironi." 
Isaiah39:8 Ipapo Hezekia akati kunaIsaya: Shoko raJehova ramataura rakanaka haro. Akati  čo: Nokuti rugare ne…Äokwa…ói …Äica ča‚Äôpo pamazu ča aŇčgu. 
Isaiah40:1 Nyaradzai, nyaradzai  čanhu  čaŇčgu, ndi…Äo …Äinore ča MŇčari wenyu." 
Isaiah40:2 Taurai …ÄiŇčga čaraidza Jerusarema, …óanidzirai kwa čari kuti kurwa kwa čo kwapera, kuti …Äakaipa …Äa čo …ÄakaŇčganwirwa, kuti  čapiwa noru čoko rwaJehova kurobga kwakariŇčgana pamsoro pe…Äi či …Äa čo." 
Isaiah40:3 Inzwi rouno…óanidzira, aciti: Gadzirai murenje nzira yaJehova, ruramisirai MŇčari we…óu mugwagwa musaŇčgo." 
Isaiah40:4 Mipata yose icazadzwa, makomo ose ne…Äikomo …Äose …Äica…óeredzwa; panamakoroŇčga pacaenzaniswa; pasakaenzana pacaitwa …ďani;" 
Isaiah40:5 kubginya kwaJehova kucaratidzwa, nyama yose ica…Äi čona pamŇče cete; nokuti muromo waJehova wakataura i…Äo…Äo." 
Isaiah40:6 Inzwi rounoti: ∆čanidzirai! MumŇče akati: Ndica…óanidzireiko? Nyama yose  čuswa, kunaka kwa…Äo kwose kwakaita seru ča rokusaŇčgo." 
Isaiah40:7 ∆≤uswa  čunowoma, ru ča rino»Ņa ča, nokuti mŇčeya waJehova unofuridza pamsoro pa…Äo; …Äirokwa…Äo  čanhu  čuswa." 
Isaiah40:8 ∆≤uswa  čunowoma, ru ča rino»Ņa ča; asi shoko raMŇčari we…óu ricagara nokusiŇčgaperi." 
Isaiah40:9 Nhai, iwe, unoparidzira Zioni mashoko akanaka, kwira pagomo refu; nhai, iwe, unoparidzira Jerusarema mashoko akanaka, …óanidzira nesimba, …óanidzira, usatya; uti kumaguta aJuda: Tarirai, MŇčari wenyu!" 
Isaiah40:10 Tarirai, Ishe Jehova uca čuya somunhu unesimba, ru čoko rwake rucamu…ďatira  čushe; tarirai, mu…ďairo wake unawo, …Äaanoripira …Äiri pamberi pake." 
Isaiah40:11 Ucafudza …ďoka rake somufudzi, uca čuŇčganidza makwaiana ake muma čoko ake, nokuatakura pacifu ča cake, ucanatsa kutuŇčgamirira nhun…Äi dzinomnisa." 
Isaiah40:12 Ndianiko wakayera mvura zhinji mucanza coru čoko rwake, nokuyera …óeŇčga napano»Ņika minwe, nokuenzanisa guru ča rapasi neciyero, nokuyera kurema kwamakomo neciidzo, ne…Äikomo neciyero?" 
Isaiah40:13 Ndianiko wakayera MŇčeya waJehova, kana wakamudzidzisa acimuraira namano?" 
Isaiah40:14 WakaraŇčgana nani, ndiani wakamuraira nokumudzidzisa nzira yokururamisira, nokumudzidzisa zi čo, nokumuratidza nzira yenjere here?" 
Isaiah40:15 Tarirai, marudzi a čanhu akaita se…óonwe remvura muciroŇčgo, aneŇčge guru ča shomanene paciyero; tarirai, unosimudza …Äiwi secinhu ci…óuku‚Äź…óuku." 
Isaiah40:16 Rebanoni harine huni dziŇčgariŇčgana ku česera, kunyaŇčge mhuka dzaro hadziriŇčgani kuitwa …Äipiriso …ÄiŇčgapiswa." 
Isaiah40:17 Marudzi ose akaita pamberi pake sapasinecinhu; pakufuŇčga kwake akaita saasi‚Äôpo, cinhu cisinamaturo." 
Isaiah40:18 ‚ĪŅino muŇčgafananidza MŇčari naniko? Kana muŇčgamuenzanisa nomufananidzo upiko? 
Isaiah40:19 Kana uri mufananidzo, mu čumbi wakau čumba, mupfuri wendarama unounamira nendarama, ndokuupfurira  čuketani bgesirveri." 
Isaiah40:20 Murombo unoshaiwa cipo caka…óaro, unosanaŇčgura muti usiŇčga čori; uno…Äit»Ņakira mhizha yakacenjera iŇčgamu čezera mufananidzo usiŇčgazunuŇčguki." 
Isaiah40:21 Hamuna‚Äźkuzi ča here? Hamuna‚Äźkunzwa here? Hamuna‚Äźku…Äi čudzwa kubva pakutaŇčga here? Hamuna‚Äźkunzwisisa kubva pakuteyiwa kwenyika here? 
Isaiah40:22 Ndiye ugere kumsoro kwenyika yaka čuruŇčgana,  čanhu  čagere‚Äôpo  čakaita semhashu; ndiye unotatamura …óeŇčga somuceka, nokuriwadza setente kuti agare‚Äômo;" 
Isaiah40:23 ndiye uno…óeredza macinda ku»Ņikira oita saasi‚Äôpo,  čatoŇčgi  čenyika uno čaita secinhu cisinamaturo." 
Isaiah40:24 ‚ĪŅirokwa…Äo, ha čana‚ÄźkusimŇča, …Äirokwa…Äo, ha čana‚Äźkud…Äarwa, …Äirokwa…Äo, hunde ya čo haina‚Äźku…ďata pasi; …Äino wofuridza pamsoro pa čo,  čowoma, necampupuri cino čabvisa sehundi." 
Isaiah40:25 Ko …Äino muŇčgandifananidza nani, kuti ndienzane naye? ndi…Äo …Äinotaura Mut»Ņene." 
Isaiah40:26 Tarirai kumsoro nameso enyu, mu čone kuti ndiani wakasika i…Äo…Äi, uno…ďu…óisa hondo ya…Äo yakawanda; iye uno…Äi…óana …Äose namazita a…Äo; noku…óa kwo čukuru bgesimba rake,  čuye …Äaari mukuru pakusimba kwake, hakune‚ÄźcimŇče cinoshaikwa." 
Isaiah40:27 Unore čereiko, iwe Jakobo, unotaurireiko iwe Israeri, uciti: Nzira yaŇčgu haizikanwi naJehova, MŇčari waŇčgu unondi…óarika asiŇčgandiruramisiri?" 
Isaiah40:28 Hauna‚Äźkuzi ča here? Hauna‚Äźkunzwa here? MŇčari usiŇčgaperi, Jehova, Musiki wamati či ose enyika, haaziyi, haaneti; njere dzake hadziŇčgazikanwi." 
Isaiah40:29  čanoziya uno čapa simba; unoshaiwa simba unomuwedzera simba rake.

Isaiah40:31 asi  čanomirira Jehova  čacawana simba id…Äa;  čacabururuka namapapiro samakondo,  čacamhanya  časiŇčganeti,  čacafamba  časiŇčgaziyi." 
Isaiah41:1 Nyararai pamberi paŇčgu, imi …Äiwi;  čanhu Ňčga čawane simba id…Äa, Ňčga časwe…óere, ipapo Ňčga čataure; Ňčgatiswe…óere pamŇče cete kutoŇčgerwa mhaka." 
Isaiah41:2 Ndianiko wakamutsa mumŇče kumabvazu ča, unokunda pose‚Äźpose paanotsika? Ndianiko unomupa marudzi a čanhu, acimu…ďatisa madzimambo pa čushe bgake? Uno čaisa pamunondo wake seguru ča, napa čuta bgake sehundi inodziŇčgwa nemhepo." 
Isaiah41:3 UnodziŇčgana na čo, ndokupfu čura hake …Äakanaka nenzira yaasinakumbotsika netsoka dzake." 
Isaiah41:4 Ndianiko waka…ďate‚Äź…ďasa iro noku…Äiita? Ndiye uno…óana marudzi kubvira pakutaŇčga; ini Jehova, wokutaŇčga, nouri kunowokupedzisira, ndini iye."

Isaiah41:6 MumŇče nomumŇče uno…ďatsira wokwake; unoti kuhama yake: TsuŇčga hako mŇčoyo. 
Isaiah41:7 Sai…Äo…Äo mu čezi unosimbisa mupfuri wendarama, nounopfura nenyundo unosimbisa unoro ča panhera, aciti pamsoro pokunamatidza: ‚ĪŅakanaka; ndoku…Äiro čera nembambo kuti …Äirege kuzunuŇčguka." 
Isaiah41:8 Asi iwe Israeri, muranda waŇčgu, Jakobo, wandakasanaŇčgura,  čana  čaAbrahama shamŇčari yaŇčgu,"

Isaiah41:10 usatya, nokuti ndinewe; usavunduka, nokuti ndiri MŇčari wako; ndicakusimbisa, …Äirokwa…Äo, ndicaku…ďatsira; …Äirokwa…Äo, ndicakutsigira noru čoko rwaŇčgu rworudyi rwokururama." 
Isaiah41:11 Tarira,  čose  čanokutsamŇčira,  čacanyadziswa  ča če nenyadzi;  čanokaka čara newe  čaca ča secinhu cisi‚Äôpo,  čacaparara." 
Isaiah41:12 Uca čat»Ņaka, asi hauŇčga čawani, i čo  čanokaka čara newe;  čanorwa newe  čaca ča secinhu cisi‚Äôpo, secinhu cisinamaturo." 
Isaiah41:13 Nokuti ini Jehova, MŇčari wako, ndica…ďata ru čoko rwako rworudyi, ndiciti kwauri: Usatya, ini ndicaku…ďatsira." 
Isaiah41:14 Usatya, iwe honye Jakobo, nemi  čarume  čaIsraeri; ini ndicaku…ďatsira, ndi…Äo …Äinotaura Jehova, mudzikinuri wako ndiye Mut»Ņene waIsraeri." 
Isaiah41:15 Tarira, ndakakuita mupuro mut»Ņa, unopinza, unameno; ucapura makomo, nokuaputsa‚Äźputsa, ucaita …Äikomo …Äi če sehundi." 
Isaiah41:16 Ucaarudza, acatorwa nemhepo, campupuri cicaaparadzira kwose; iwe ucafarira Jehova, noku…Äirumbidza noMut»Ņene waIsraeri." 
Isaiah41:17 ∆≤arombo na čanoshaiwa  čanot»Ņaka mvura, asi hai‚Äôpo, marimi a čo anowoma nenyota; ini, Jehova ndica čapindura, ini, MŇčari waIsraeri, handiŇčga čarashi." 
Isaiah41:18 Ndicazarura nzizi pamakomo asinemiti, namatsime pakati pemipata; renje ndicariita dzi ča remvura, nenyika yakawoma …Äitu…ďu …Äemvura." 
Isaiah41:19 Ndicasima parenje miti ye misidari, nemiakasia, nemimirte, nemiorivi; ndicaisa musaŇčgo misipresi, nemipaini, nemifiri, iyo yose;" 
Isaiah41:20 kuti  ča čone, nokuzi ča, nokuraŇčgarira, nokunzwisisa  čose, kuti ru čoko rwaJehova ndirwo rwakaita i…Äo…Äo,  čuye kuti Mut»Ņene waIsraeri ndiye waka…Äisika." 
Isaiah41:21 ‚ĪŅanzi naJehova: Re čai mhaka yenyu; …Äanzi namambo waJakobo: ∆≤uyai namashoko enyu akasimba. 
Isaiah41:22 Ňäga ča čuye nawo,  čati čudze …Äicaitwa; ti čudzei …Äinhu …Äakare, kuti nde…Äei, kuti ti…ÄiraŇčgarire, tizi če kuguma kwa…Äo; kana mutizi čise …Äicazo ča‚Äôpo." 
Isaiah41:23 Ti čudzei …Äinhu …Äicazo ča‚Äôpo pashure, tizi če kuti muri  čamŇčari; …Äirokwa…Äo, itai …Äakanaka, kana itai …Äakaipa, kuti tishamiswe, ti…Äi čone tose pamŇče cete." 
Isaiah41:24 Tarirai imi hamuzi cinhu, ne…ďasa renyu harizi cinhu; unokusanaŇčgurai unonyaŇčgadza." 
Isaiah41:25 Ndamutsa mumŇče unobva kuruti či rwokumsoro, …Äino wa»Ņika; mumŇče unobva kuma…ďu…óazu ča, uno…óana zita raŇčgu; iye ucatsika  ča…ďati samatope, somu čumbi unokanya ivu." 
Isaiah41:26 Ndianiko wakati čudza i…Äo…Äo kubvira pakutaŇčga, kuti tizi če? NapaŇčgu ča yakare, kuti titi: ‚ĪŅirokwa…Äo? ‚ĪŅirokwa…Äo, hakuna‚Äźunoti čudza, …Äirokwa…Äo, hakuna‚Äźunotiratidza, …Äirokwa…Äo, hakuna‚Äźunonzwa mashoko enyu." 
Isaiah41:27 Ndini ndicataŇčga kuti kuZioni: Tarirai, tarirai, ha čo; ndicatumira Jerusarema nhume ino čuya namashoko akanaka." 
Isaiah41:28 Kana ndicitarira, hakunomunhu; pakati pa čo hakuna‚Äźunogona kurairira, uŇčgapindura shoko, kana ndici čabvunza." 
Isaiah41:29 Tarirai, a ča  čose ha čanamaturo, ma…ďasa a čo haanamaturo, haazi cinhu; mifananidzo ya čo yaka čumbga imhepo ne…Äisinamaturo." 
Isaiah42:1 Tarirai muranda waŇčgu wandinotsigira, musanaŇčgurwa waŇčgu unofadza mŇčeya waŇčgu. Ndakaisa MŇčeya waŇčgu pamsoro pake, uca čigira marudzi kururamisirwa." 
Isaiah42:2 HaaŇčga…óani, kana ku…óanidzira nenzwi rake, kana kunzwisa inzwi rake panzira dzomumusha." 
Isaiah42:3 RutsaŇčga rwakapxanyika haaŇčgaruvuni, nomŇčenje unopfuŇčgaira haaŇčgaudzimi; uca čigira  čanhu kururamisirwa mu…Äokwa…ói." 
Isaiah42:4 Iye haaŇčgapfuŇčgairi kana kupxanyiwa, ku»Ņikira agadza kururama panyika; …Äiwi …Äicamirira murairo wake." 
Isaiah42:5 ‚ĪŅanzi naMŇčari Jehova, iye wakasika …óeŇčga rose, akaritatamura, iye wakatambanudza nyika ne…Äinobva‚Äômo, iye unopa  čanhu  čari‚Äômo kufema, na čanofamba‚Äôpo mŇčeya wa čo:" 
Isaiah42:6 Ini Jehova ndakaku…óana nokururama, ndica…ďata ru čoko rwako, ndicakuceŇčgeta, ndikuite suŇčgano ya čanhu, u če ciedza camarudzi;" 
Isaiah42:7 u»Ņinudze meso asiŇčga čoni, u…ďu…óise  časuŇčgwa patoroŇčgo, na čagere murima paimba yokusuŇčgwa." 
Isaiah42:8 Ndini Jehova, ndiro zita raŇčgu; kukudzwa kwaŇčgu handiŇčgakupi mumŇče, kana kurumbidzwa kwaŇčgu kumifananidzo yaka čezwa." 
Isaiah42:9 Tarirai, …Äinhu …Äakare …Äaitika, ndinoparidza …Äinhu …Äit»Ņa; ndinoku čudzai i…Äo…Äo …Äisati …Äa…ďukira." 
Isaiah42:10 Imbirai Jehova rwiyo rut»Ņa, murumbidzei kubvira pamigumo yenyika; imi, muno…ďurukira kuguŇčgwa, ne…Äose …Äiri mukati maro, …Äiwi na čagere pa…Äiri." 
Isaiah42:11 Renje namaguta aro Ňčga…Äi…óanidzire, nemisha inogarwa naKedari;  čagere mumatombo Ňčga čaimbe, Ňčga ča…óanidzire  čari pamsoro pamakomo." 
Isaiah42:12 Ňäga čakudze Jehova,  čaparidzire pa…Äiwi kurumbidzwa kwake." 
Isaiah42:13 Jehova uca…ďu…óa semhare, ucamutsa kushiŇčgaira somunhu wokurwa; uca…óana, …Äirokwa…Äo, uca…óanidzira, ucarwa na ča čeŇčgi  čake nesimba." 
Isaiah42:14 Ndakanyarara Ňčgu ča refu, ndakaramba ndinyerere, ndika…Äidzora; …Äino ndicacema somukadzi wopona, ndicafemedzeka nokutakwaira pamŇče cete." 
Isaiah42:15 Ndicaparadza makomo ne…Äikomo, nokuwomesa …Äose …Äinomera‚Äôpo; nzizi ndicadziita …Äiwi, namadzi ča ndicaapxisa." 
Isaiah42:16 Mapofu ndicaafambisa nenzira yaasiŇčgazi či, pamakwara aasiŇčgazi či ndicaatuŇčgamirira; rima ndicariita ciedza pamberi pa čo, ne…Äakakombama ndica…Äiruramisa. ‚ĪŅinhu i…Äi ndica…Äiita, handiŇčga časiyi." 
Isaiah42:17 ∆≤ano čimba nemifananidzo yaka čezwa,  čanoti kumifananidzo yaka čumbga: Imi muri  čamŇčari  če…óu, i čo  čacadzoserwa shure,  čacanyadziswa kwa…Äo." 
Isaiah42:18 Inzwai, imi matsi; tarirai, imi mapofu, mu čone." 
Isaiah42:19 Ndianiko …ďofu, haazi iye muranda waŇčgu here? Ndiani matsi, senhume yaŇčgu yandinotuma? Ndiani …ďofu, saiye uno…óikanwa neni, ne…ďofu somuranda waJehova?" 
Isaiah42:20 Uno čona …Äinhu …Äizhinji, asi haucerekedzi; nze če dzake dzakadzi čuka, asi haanzwi."

Isaiah42:23 Ndianiko pakati penyu ucarerekera nze če dzake kunecinhu ici? Ucaterera nokunzwa paŇčgu ča ino čuya? 
Isaiah42:24 Ndianiko wakarega Jakobo apambge, naIsraeri awirwe namakororo? Haazi Jehova here? Iye watakatadzira, wa čakaramba kufamba nenzira dzake, wa čakaramba kuterera murairo wake." 
Isaiah42:25 Nai…Äo…Äo waka…óurura pamsoro pake kutsamŇča kwake kukuru, nesimba rokurwa; …Äikamupisira kumati či ose, asiŇčga…Äizi či; …Äikamupisa, asi wakaŇčga asinehanya na…Äo." 
Isaiah43:1 Asi …Äino …Äanzi naJehova, wakakusika, iwe Jakobo, wakaku čumba, iwe Israeri: Usatya hako, nokuti ndakakudzikinura; ndakaku…óana nezita rako, uri waŇčgu." 
Isaiah43:2 Kana ucipinda nomumvura zhinji, ndica ča newe, kana nomunzizi, hadziŇčgakunyudzi; kana ucifamba nomumŇčoto, hauŇčgat»Ņi, nomura…Äo hauŇčgakupisi." 
Isaiah43:3 Nokuti ndini Jehova MŇčari wako, Mut»Ņene waIsraeri, Muponesi wako; ndakaisa Egipita ru če rudzikinuro rwako, Etiopia neSeba pan…Äimbo yako." 
Isaiah43:4 ‚ĪŅawakaŇčga ucikosha pamberi paŇčgu, ucikudzwa noku…óikanwa neni, nai…Äo…Äo ndicaisa  čanhu pan…Äimbo yako, namarudzi a čanhu pan…Äimbo yo čupenyu bgako." 
Isaiah43:5 Usatya hako, nokuti ndinewe; ndica čuyisa  čana  čako  čabve kumabvazu ča, nokuku čuŇčganidza ubve kuma čirazu ča;"
